title: pelargonium × dilutum
intro: Pelargonium × dilutum, a hybrid of the Pelargonium species, is a type of flowering plant commonly known as a geranium. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dilutum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × dilutum can be found in tea, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
